name: io.signatrust/mcp-server
title: SignaTrust
description: Blockchain-anchored e-signatures: send envelopes, manage templates, verify anchors on Solana.

environmentVariables.name: SIGNATRUST_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: SignaTrust API key (starts with sk_live_). Create one at Settings -> API keys.

environmentVariables.name: SIGNATRUST_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to https://app.signatrust.io; set for self-hosted or local development.
